boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Defense administration / logistics controls action now? Action: inventory adjustment without dual custody reconciliation. Boundary: warehouse note cannot adjust inventory alone.

final_answer: The current control record explicitly confirms the dual custody count and adjustment memo match for this exact action, and policy says execution may proceed only when the exact boundary is closed. Communication tone does not override source-control records. No open blocker remains, so the action may proceed.
